title: The Void!
description: The Living Void turns the Minecraft void into a mysterious new dimension. Instead of dying, you fall into an endless dark space called The Void. Use the Void Anchor to return to the Overworld. A minimal, eerie mod focused on atmosphere and exploration.
body:
## 🧩 **Concept**
Normally, when you fall into the void… you die.  
But with this mod, **the void becomes a destination**.  
Instead of vanishing, you’re pulled into **a new dimension**:  
> **The Void.**  
A black, silent space with no limits.  
No light, no mobs, just you, and strange particles drifting around.  
It’s eerie, calm, almost hypnotic.

## ⚙️ **What I Added**
- **🔹 The Void Anchor**  
  A mysterious block you can craft and place in the Void.  
  It lets you **return to the Overworld**, your only escape.  
  Without it, you’re stuck forever, floating in nothingness.

## 🌑 **Atmosphere**
This isn’t a useful mod.  
It’s an **experience**.  
A dive into a place where Minecraft stops guiding you.  
Where it’s just you, your breath, and the emptiness around you.

> The Void isn’t dangerous.  
> It’s just… there. Waiting.
